scripts.deploy: ssh root@orion7.skybug.ru 'mkdir -p /var/www/orion7/server' && rsync -avz --delete ./ root@orion7.skybug.ru:/var/www/orion7/server/ && ssh root@orion7.skybug.ru 'cd /var/www/orion7/server && npm install --omit=dev && npm run migrate && (pm2 restart orion7 --update-env || pm2 start index.js --name orion7)'
